case_title: PETER FRANK WEIS VS. REBOUND INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REBOUND INTERNATIONAL WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS DELAWARE REBOUND INTERNATIONAL, INC. $159,218.32 PRINCIPAL, $2,064.93 INTEREST, $203.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $161,486.25, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $161,486.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEIS, PETER FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT REBOUND INTERNATIONAL WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS DELAWARE REBOUND INTERNATIONAL, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
